description: ASE cargo X-ray scanner adapter — cursor-sync source. The upstream is a remote SQL Server table the vendor populates with new scan rows; the adapter implements both IScannerAdapter (for sweep + canonical bundle) AND IScannerCursorSyncAdapter (for AseSyncWorker-driven batch pulls). Sprint 50 ships the contract shape; vendor-specific protocol wiring lands when an ASE site is provisioned.

ConnectionString.description: Vendor SQL Server connection string. Empty in Sprint 50 stub mode — the adapter no-ops cleanly when unset.

ScanQuery.description: Adapter-specific SQL the upstream cursor cycle issues. Reserved for the real adapter wiring; ignored in stub mode.

PollOverlapMinutes.description: Cursor-window overlap on every pull, in minutes — guards against late-arriving rows on the source. Reserved for the real adapter wiring.
